dataset: USGS Earthquake Feed + Natural Earth Countries

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads from https://earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/feed/v1.0/summary/2.5_month.geojson to this path
setup_task.sh downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/geo-countries/master/data/countries.geojson to this path
task.json description and export_result.sh confirm this output path

task.json and setup_task.sh GT computation (lines 124-137) validate these exact four fields with specifications: quake_count (integer), mean_mag (float, 2 decimals), max_mag (float), risk_tier (string)
setup_task.sh line 78 and 155 confirm ground truth is saved to this path

pi_items.metadata_value: USGS real-time earthquake feed (M2.5+, last 30 days)
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed USGS earthquake feed exists and is publicly available. Downloaded actual data: 1917 earthquakes M2.5+, FeatureCollection of Point geometries with mag property

pi_items.verified_value: Natural Earth country boundaries via datasets/geo-countries GitHub repository (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/geo-countries/master/data/countries.geojson)
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed datasets/geo-countries is official repository providing Natural Earth data. Downloaded actual data: 258 countries with MultiPolygon/Polygon geometries

pi_items.metadata_value: Country boundaries have 'ADMIN' field for country name
pi_items.verified_value: Countries have 'name' field for country name (not 'ADMIN')
pi_items.source: Downloaded actual geojson file from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/geo-countries/master/data/countries.geojson and inspected properties. Field names are: 'name', 'ISO3166-1-Alpha-2', 'ISO3166-1-Alpha-3'. Repository README confirms field is 'name' from admin field

pi_items.metadata_value: Country boundaries have 'ISO_A3' field for ISO code
pi_items.verified_value: Countries have 'ISO3166-1-Alpha-3' field for ISO 3-letter code (not 'ISO_A3')
pi_items.source: Downloaded actual geojson file and verified field names. ISO codes are stored in 'ISO3166-1-Alpha-3' field. Repository README confirms this naming convention from ogr2ogr conversion

pi_items.metadata_value: USGS feed data is last 30 days (real-time, varies by run)
pi_items.verified_value: USGS data is real-time and updated every 5-15 minutes per USGS documentation
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed USGS earthquake feed is updated automatically every 5-15 minutes. Downloaded data shows current timestamp and count metadata

pi_items.metadata_value: Data is real earthquake and country data from authoritative sources
pi_items.verified_value: Data is real: USGS earthquake feed (https://earthquake.usgs.gov/earthquakes/feed/) is official US Geological Survey real-time data; Natural Earth data via datasets/geo-countries is official geodata repository
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed both data sources are real, authoritative, publicly available. Downloaded and inspected actual files containing real earthquake events and actual country boundaries

pi_items.metadata_value: GT file contains expected country statistics computed from downloaded data using shapely point-in-polygon
pi_items.verified_value: setup_task.sh lines 65-158 compute GT with shapely: loads earthquakes_month.geojson, loads countries.geojson, performs point-in-polygon for each country, computes quake_count, mean_mag (2 decimals), max_mag, risk_tier, saves to /tmp/gt_seismic.json
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and test GT computation with actual downloaded data: 51 countries have earthquakes, 658 earthquakes accounted for out of 1917 total

pi_items.metadata_value: risk_tier: 'low' if quake_count < 5, 'medium' if quake_count >= 5 and < 15, 'high' if quake_count >= 15
pi_items.verified_value: risk_tier: 'low' if count < 5, 'medium' if count < 15, 'high' otherwise
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 127-132 and export_result.sh lines 139-144 both implement these exact thresholds

pi_items.metadata_value: Output must include ONLY countries with at least 1 earthquake, exclude countries with zero earthquakes
pi_items.verified_value: setup_task.sh line 123 and export_result.sh filtering confirm: only countries with quakes_in list non-empty are included
pi_items.source: Code analysis shows conditional 'if quakes_in:' ensures only countries with earthquakes are in GT results

Task requires: spatial join (point-in-polygon), attribute aggregation, conditional field computation, complex GIS workflow in QGIS - these are advanced GIS skills. Task description indicates real-world reinsurance workflow. Timeout 600 sec, 80 max steps suggests complex multi-step task
task.json init.timeout_sec = 600 (10 minutes). Reasonable for QGIS GUI automation task involving spatial joins and GeoJSON output

privileged_info_summary: The seismic_risk_country_exposure task uses real, publicly available data: USGS earthquake feed (M2.5+, last 30 days, updated every 5-15 minutes) and Natural Earth country boundaries from datasets/geo-countries GitHub repository. Data is not synthetic. However, the task description contains two field name errors: it claims the countries file has 'ADMIN' and 'ISO_A3' fields, but the actual data has 'name' and 'ISO3166-1-Alpha-3' fields respectively. The setup_task.sh script handles both naming conventions through fallback logic, so the task still functions correctly. Expected output fields (quake_count, mean_mag, max_mag, risk_tier) are correct. Ground truth computation uses shapely point-in-polygon to count earthquakes per country (verified: 51 countries with earthquakes, 658 earthquakes accounted from 1917 total). Risk tier thresholds are correctly specified: low (count<5), medium (5<=count<15), high (count>=15). Task is marked very_hard difficulty with 600-second timeout, which is reasonable for advanced spatial GIS work.
